hotel-pricerange.type_desc: price range indicating how cheap or expensive the option is.
hotel-pricerange.question_desc: What is the price range or budget level for this option?
hotel-pricerange.contras_desc: it is the budget level for staying at a hotel.NOT restaurant-pricerange (meal cost).Not hotel-stars (rating).

hotel-type.type_desc: category or kind of place where the user can stay or visit.
hotel-type.question_desc: What type or category of place is the user interested in?
hotel-type.contras_desc: it is the accommodation type (e.g., hotel/guesthouse).NOT attraction-type (sightseeing category).Not hotel-stars (rating).

hotel-parking.type_desc: requirement or availability of parking at or near the place.
hotel-parking.concise_desc: whether have parking in the hotel.
hotel-parking.question_desc: Does the user need parking, or does the place provide parking?
hotel-parking.contras_desc: it indicates whether the hotel provides parking.NOT hotel-internet (wifi).Not hotel-area or hotel-name.

hotel-book stay.type_desc: duration or length of stay measured in nights.
hotel-book stay.concise_desc: number of stay for the hotel booking.
hotel-book stay.question_desc: How many nights is the stay or booking for?
hotel-book stay.contras_desc: it is the number of nights for the hotel booking.NOT hotel-book day (date) or hotel-book people (party size).

hotel-book day.type_desc: calendar day on which the booking or stay starts.
hotel-book day.question_desc: On which day does the user want to start the booking?
hotel-book day.contras_desc: it is the date/day for the hotel booking.NOT hotel-book stay (nights) or hotel-book people (party size).

hotel-book people.type_desc: number of people included in the booking.
hotel-book people.concise_desc: number of people for the hotel booking
hotel-book people.question_desc: How many people are included in the booking?
hotel-book people.contras_desc: it is the number of people for the hotel booking.NOT restaurant-book people (table) or train-book people (tickets).Not hotel-book day or hotel-book stay.

hotel-area.type_desc: spatial area or part of town where the place is located.
hotel-area.question_desc: In which area or part of town is the place located?
hotel-area.contras_desc: it is the location area of the hotel.NOT restaurant-area or attraction-area (areas for dining/visiting).Not hotel-name or hotel-pricerange.

hotel-stars.concise_desc: number of stars of the hotel.
hotel-stars.question_desc: What is the star rating or quality level of the place?
hotel-stars.contras_desc: it is the star rating/quality level of the hotel.NOT hotel-pricerange (budget).Not hotel-type (accommodation category).

hotel-internet.type_desc: requirement or availability of internet or wifi service.
hotel-internet.concise_desc: whether have internet in the hotel
hotel-internet.question_desc: Does the user require internet or wifi, or does the place offer it?
hotel-internet.contras_desc: it indicates whether the hotel provides internet/wifi.NOT hotel-parking.Not hotel-area or hotel-name.

hotel-name.type_desc: specific name or title of the place.
hotel-name.question_desc: What is the specific name of the place?
hotel-name.contras_desc: it is the proper name of a place to stay.NOT restaurant-name (a place to eat) and attraction-name (a place to visit).Not hotel-area or hotel-type.

train-destination.type_desc: destination place or endpoint of the trip.
train-destination.concise_desc: location of destination of the train.
train-destination.question_desc: What is the destination or endpoint of the trip?
train-destination.contras_desc: it is the destination station/city where the train ends.NOT train-departure (start point).Not taxi-destination (taxi drop-off).

train-day.type_desc: calendar day on which the trip happens.
train-day.question_desc: On which day does the user want to travel?
train-day.contras_desc: it is the travel day/date for the train.NOT hotel-book day or restaurant-book day (booking dates).Not train-leaveat/arriveby (times).

train-departure.type_desc: departure place or starting point of the trip.
train-departure.concise_desc: location of departure of the train
train-departure.question_desc: From where does the user want to depart?
train-departure.contras_desc: it is the origin station/city where the train starts.NOT train-destination (end point).Not taxi-departure (taxi pickup).

train-arriveby.type_desc: arrival deadline time by which the user must reach the destination.
train-arriveby.concise_desc: time of arrive by of the train.
train-arriveby.question_desc: By what time must the user arrive at the destination?
train-arriveby.contras_desc: it is the time by which the train should arrive.NOT train-leaveat (departure time).Not taxi-arriveby (taxi time).

train-book people.type_desc: number of passengers or tickets needed.
train-book people.concise_desc: number of people for the train booking.
train-book people.question_desc: How many people or tickets are needed for the trip?
train-book people.contras_desc: it is the number of people/tickets for the train booking.NOT restaurant-book people (table) or hotel-book people (hotel party).Not train-day (travel date).

train-leaveat.type_desc: departure time when the trip starts.
train-leaveat.concise_desc: time of leave at of the train.
train-leaveat.question_desc: At what time does the user want to leave or depart?
train-leaveat.contras_desc: it is the departure time of the train.NOT train-arriveby (arrival deadline).Not taxi-leaveat (taxi time).

attraction-area.type_desc: spatial area or part of town where the attraction is located.
attraction-area.question_desc: In which area or part of town is the attraction located?
attraction-area.contras_desc: it is the location area of the attraction.NOT hotel-area or restaurant-area (areas for staying/eating).Not attraction-name or attraction-type.

attraction-name.type_desc: specific name or title of the attraction.
attraction-name.question_desc: What is the specific name of the attraction?
attraction-name.contras_desc: it is the proper name of a place to visit.NOT hotel-name (a place to stay) and restaurant-name (a place to eat).Not attraction-type or attraction-area.

attraction-type.type_desc: category or kind of attraction or venue.
attraction-type.question_desc: What type or category of attraction is the user interested in?
attraction-type.contras_desc: it is the category of a place to visit (e.g., museum/park).NOT hotel-type (accommodation) or restaurant-food (cuisine).Not attraction-name.

restaurant-food.type_desc: cuisine or food style served at the place.
restaurant-food.question_desc: What type of cuisine or food is the user looking for?
restaurant-food.contras_desc: it is the cuisine/food type served.NOT restaurant-pricerange (budget) or restaurant-area (location).Not restaurant-name.

restaurant-pricerange.type_desc: price range indicating how cheap or expensive the meal is.
restaurant-pricerange.question_desc: What is the price range or budget level for dining?
restaurant-pricerange.contras_desc: it is the budget level for eating at a restaurant.NOT hotel-pricerange (accommodation cost).Not restaurant-food (cuisine).

restaurant-area.type_desc: spatial area or part of town where the dining place is located.
restaurant-area.question_desc: In which area or part of town is the place to eat located?
restaurant-area.contras_desc: it is the location area of the restaurant.NOT hotel-area or attraction-area (areas for staying/visiting).Not restaurant-name or restaurant-food.

restaurant-name.type_desc: specific name or title of the dining place.
restaurant-name.question_desc: What is the specific name of the restaurant or place to eat?
restaurant-name.contras_desc: it is the proper name of a place to eat.NOT hotel-name (a place to stay) and attraction-name (a place to visit).Not restaurant-food or restaurant-area.

restaurant-book time.type_desc: time of day for the dining reservation.
restaurant-book time.question_desc: At what time does the user want to have the meal or reservation?
restaurant-book time.contras_desc: it is the time for the restaurant reservation.NOT restaurant-book day (date) or restaurant-book people (party size).Not train-leaveat/arriveby (travel times).

restaurant-book day.type_desc: calendar day for the dining reservation.
restaurant-book day.question_desc: On which day does the user want to book the meal or table?
restaurant-book day.contras_desc: it is the date/day for the restaurant reservation.NOT restaurant-book time (clock time) or restaurant-book people (party size).Not hotel-book day (hotel date).

restaurant-book people.type_desc: number of diners for the reservation.
restaurant-book people.concise_desc: number of people for the restaurant booking.
restaurant-book people.question_desc: How many people is the reservation or table for?
restaurant-book people.contras_desc: it is the number of people for the restaurant reservation.NOT hotel-book people (hotel party) or train-book people (tickets).Not restaurant-book day or restaurant-book time.

taxi-leaveat.type_desc: pickup time when the ride should start.
taxi-leaveat.concise_desc: time of leave at of the taxi.
taxi-leaveat.question_desc: At what time should the ride pick up the user?
taxi-leaveat.contras_desc: it is the time the taxi should leave.NOT taxi-arriveby (arrival deadline).Not train-leaveat (train time).

taxi-arriveby.type_desc: arrival deadline time by which the ride must reach the destination.
taxi-arriveby.question_desc: By what time must the ride reach the destination?
taxi-arriveby.contras_desc: it is the time by which the taxi should arrive.NOT taxi-leaveat (departure time).Not train-arriveby (train time).

taxi-destination.type_desc: destination place or drop-off location of the ride.
taxi-destination.concise_desc: location of destination of the taxi.
taxi-destination.question_desc: Where does the user want to go or be dropped off?
taxi-destination.contras_desc: it is the taxi drop-off location (end point).NOT taxi-departure (pickup).Not train-destination (train end).

taxi-departure.type_desc: pickup place or starting location of the ride.
taxi-departure.concise_desc: location of departure of the taxi.
taxi-departure.question_desc: From where should the ride pick up the user?
taxi-departure.contras_desc: it is the taxi pickup location (start point).NOT taxi-destination (drop-off).Not train-departure (train origin).
